expectations.text: Uses jekyll-picture-tag plugin (or equivalent responsive image solution)
Gemfile includes version pin for the plugin (e.g., ~> 2.1)
Configuration includes WebP format with fallback
Configuration includes multiple widths for srcset (at least 480, 800, 1200)
expectations.evidence: Line 16: 'widths: [400, 800, 1200]' - starts at 400 not 480, only 3 sizes instead of 4

expectations.text: Includes lazy loading attribute in configuration
Notes about LCP optimization for above-the-fold images
expectations.evidence: No mention of above-the-fold vs below-the-fold optimization

expectations.text: Mentions Netlify build pipeline (no extra setup needed)
expectations.evidence: Lines 25-26: 'Netlify automatically runs bundle install and jekyll build'

eval_feedback.overall: Sin skill: falta version pin, srcset limitado, sin notas de LCP
